typography.rules: Use monospace fonts exclusively to reinforce the 'terminal/parser' hacker aesthetic. Maintain high contrast.

layout_and_spacing.rules: Avoid large rounded corners. Use sharp edges or minimal 2px/4px rounding to match retro-terminal aesthetics. Utilize subtle 1px neon borders.

bottom_navigation.style: Flat solid dark background. Active icons glow slightly using drop-shadow.

primary.style: Uppercase, tracking-widest. Touch feedback should simulate a terminal keypress (slight scale down + background color fill).

secondary.style: Used for secondary actions like 'Clear' or 'Cancel'.

parser_area.style: Allow multiline scroll. Font must be strictly monospace.

account_item.layout: Row flex. Left side: Checkbox + UID:Password (password masked). Right side: Status badge.

stat_widget.layout: Label on top (caption style), Big dynamic number in the center (text-accent).

badges.style: px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-bold border

login.layout: Centered form over pure black background. Scanline overlay if possible.
elements: App Logo/Title with monospace 'System Access' subtitle
Live Preview List (FlatList showing a sample of parsed valid formats)

accounts_list.layout: FlatList with a sticky control header.
elements: Control Header: Status filters (All, Valid, Invalid, Pending) and Bulk Checkbox
Bulk Action Row: Mock Check, Delete, Export
Mock Check Bottom Sheet: Delay slider (ms), 'Start Check' button, progress ring/bar
Row Widgets: Valid Count, Invalid Count
Progress/Ratio Bar (Valid vs Invalid visually represented)
Recent Activity Log (Terminal-style text list: '[10:45:01] System: 50 accounts checked')

interactions_and_motion.loading_states: Use terminal-style loaders (e.g., ASCII spinners ['|', '/', '-', '\'] or glowing progress bars) instead of generic native circular spinners.
interactions_and_motion.modals: Use native BottomSheets (e.g., @gorhom/bottom-sheet) with dark themes and neon borders for editing or running checks.
interactions_and_motion.press_feedback: Native touch opacity (activeOpacity 0.7) combined with subtle haptic feedback for primary actions.

test_attributes.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid or testID (in React Native).

media.notes: No external images required. Design relies entirely on color, typography, borders, and UI composition to achieve the Hacker/Terminal aesthetic.
